PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Continued To Nov-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Donald Dowling for (petitioner) Theodosios Theodosopoulos.

The Court stated that this is a petition for probate that there is a question of notice, that it looks like there are living heirs that have been identified but not noticed and asked about the paternal family. Mr. Dowling stated that there were 3 maternal heirs that should have been noticed but were not due to an oversight, that regarding the paternal heirs they were working under constraints, that the decedent was not close to her family, that she was friends with Mr. Theodosopoulos for sixty years and he states that she never saw family members, that they spent 45 hours on Ancestry.com, that they called and talked to potential heirs, that they pulled documentation from the Los Angeles Court as there were potential heirs in Los Angeles and that they will do whatever the Court wants. The Court stated that it had not known of the follow up work, that it does not know what leads turned up or were followed, that it wants a declaration regarding the diligence of the search, that it will leave it up to counsel to conclude and tell the Court if everything has been done. Mr. Dowling stated that they will consider hiring a private detective. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed was continued to November 23, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Continued To Oct-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
